message:
Merge pull request #172 from kubestellar/andy-oci-delete

🐛  need to fix delete step of GitHub action

files.patch:
@@ -135,6 +135,7 @@ jobs:
 
           IMAGE_IDS=$(oci artifacts container image list \
             --repository-name "kubestellar-docs-prs" \
+            --compartment-id "${{ secrets.OCI_CLI_TENANCY }}" \
             --query "data[?contains(display-name, 'pr-${{ github.event.number }}')].id" \
             --raw-output)

@@ -22,6 +22,9 @@ rules:
   - apiGroups: ["batch"]
     resources: ["jobs"]
     verbs: ["get", "list"]
+  - apiGroups: ["networking.k8s.io"]
+    resources: ["ingresses"]
+    verbs: ["get", "list", "create", "update", "patch", "delete", "watch"]
 ---
 apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
 kind: RoleBinding
